summary: Cycle 1 fully complete. All 3 students delivered. HongYang: 6 findings + 7 diagnostic tasks + spec ambiguity experiment framework (now running 6 subagents). Matheus: infrastructure complete + exp-003 running + critical feedback quality mechanism finding. Golden: still working on failure taxonomy. H5 and H6 experiments in progress.

dynamic_hooks.description: commit all cycle work before stopping

key_facts: H6 (feedback quality): Docker-graded iterative 2/2 PASS on django-11820 vs 0/3 standard. Contradicts arXiv 2602.07900.
H5 (spec ambiguity): self-adversarial internal reflection is novel vs Ambig-SWE/LHAW external dialogue
7 METR-compatible diagnostic tasks designed: context retention, goal drift, false victory, grep test, marathon migration, elegance test, fragile chain
Matheus: exp-003 tool ablation 18/120 trials. cc-no-edit 2x faster than cc-no-search.
HongYang running 6 subagents for spec ambiguity control vs treatment experiment
Matheus assigned: controlled feedback quality experiment (no/weak/strong/oracle × 5 trials)
Golden: failure taxonomy still in progress (deeper analytical task)
Claude Agent SDK v0.2.74 installed. Must delete process.env.CLAUDECODE for nested sessions.
Key insight: architecture must enforce what prompts cannot (independence, quality, scope)
Paper outline possible: diagnostic benchmark + spec clarification + feedback quality mechanism
